title: Ice and Fire Improved Copper
description: Adds vanilla-styled copper textures to Ice and Fire
body:
Have you wanted the latest releases of the amazing Ice and Fire mod to feature more vanilla-styled copper textures for its armor, tools, items, and mobs? Look no further than right here! This pack updates the Ice and Fire textures to match the color palette of the Minecraft's vanilla copper that was released in 1.17+.

This pack includes textures for copper armor and tools, copper lightning dragons, eggs, and scales, copper dragon armor, copper nuggets, copper piles, and for 1.18 and below, copper ingots and copper ore.

![Vanilla-styled Ice and Fire armor and tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XJU0uuG1/images/7145b8e0eef188222f156ceda4a241d7d488478b.png)
Vanilla-style copper armor and tools

This pack is fully compatible with all 1.17, 1.18, 1.19, and 1.20 versions of Ice and Fire.
